anchor.value: docs link check reports one missing target

localRead.questionAnswered: The index points to the old owner path while the new front door exists.

hypothesis.statement: Updating the single index target will remove the missing-link failure.
hypothesis.falsifier: The link check still reports the same target after the index edit.

edit.summary: Updated one stale reference index target.

validation.evidence: The missing target is no longer reported.

claimBoundary: This receipt records one build loop and does not prove final correctness or closure.
